name: HOME BANCORP, INC.
summary: Home Bancorp, Inc. is a Louisiana bank holding company for Home Bank, N.A., headquartered in Lafayette, Louisiana. The Bank operates 43 banking offices across south Louisiana, west Mississippi, and Houston, Texas. It offers commercial real estate loans, commercial and industrial loans, residential mortgages, home equity products, construction loans, consumer loans, deposit accounts, and investment securities, deriving income primarily from interest on loans and securities.

products.name: Commercial Real Estate Loans
products.description: Loans secured by commercial real estate properties, prioritized for higher yields and shorter anticipated lives.

products.name: Commercial and Industrial Loans
products.description: C&I loans to business borrowers, valued for higher yields and associated core deposit relationships.

products.name: One-to-Four Family Mortgage Loans
products.description: Residential first mortgage loans originated in the Bank's market areas.

products.description: Home equity lending products offered to retail customers.

products.description: Loans for construction projects and land acquisition.
